entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the host plant in the pathosystem

entities.name: GROUNDNUT RUST
entities.description: Puccinia arachidis Speg., the pathogen causing rust disease

entities.name: PERU
entities.description: Country in South America where the groundnut-rust pathosystem coevolved

entities.name: SOUTH AMERICA
entities.description: Continent where the groundnut-rust pathosystem coevolved and spread from

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: An economically important disease on groundnut causing significant yield losses

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of groundnut, which is reduced by rust

entities.name: RUST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut genotypes to resist rust, characterized as quantitative and intermediate

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE INHERITANCE
entities.description: The complex, non-simple inheritance pattern of rust resistance

entities.name: RACE-SPECIFIC RESISTANCE
entities.description: A pattern of resistance based on specific pathogen races

entities.name: RACE-NON-SPECIFIC RESISTANCE
entities.description: A pattern of resistance that is not dependent on specific pathogen races

relationships.description: Crop that possesses the resistance trait
